description: 支持顶部对话框，底部对话框，内容输入对话框，弹出对话框，对话框嵌套

attributes.name: [event]confirm
attributes.description: Function | 确定按钮点击时触发

attributes.name: [event]cancel
attributes.description: Function | 取消按钮点击时触发

attributes.name: [event]close
attributes.description: Function | 关闭按钮点击时触发发

attributes.name: [event]input
attributes.description: Function | 输入时触发

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: String | 模式 (默认 modal)

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: String | 显示位置 (默认 center)

attributes.name: popoverId
attributes.description: String | 弹窗目标ID

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: String | 标题

attributes.name: titleSize
attributes.description: Any | 标题大小 (默认 16)

attributes.name: titleColor
attributes.description: String | 标题颜色 (默认 #000 )

attributes.name: titleDarkColor
attributes.description: String | 深色 none - 不显示，auto - 自动适配深色模式，其他 - 颜色

attributes.name: titleBold
attributes.description: Boolean | 标题加粗 (默认 true )

attributes.name: titleStyle
attributes.description: String | 标题自定义样式

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: String | 内容

attributes.name: contentSize
attributes.description: Any | 内容大小 (默认 15)

attributes.name: contentColor
attributes.description: String | 内容颜色 (默认 #333 )

attributes.name: contentDarkColor
attributes.description: String | 深色 none - 不显示，auto - 自动适配深色模式，其他 - 颜色

attributes.name: contentAlign
attributes.description: String | 对齐方式 (默认 center)

attributes.name: bodyStyle
attributes.description: String | 主题内容自定义样式

attributes.name: contentStyle
attributes.description: String | 内容自定义样式

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: String | 占位内容 (默认 请输入... )

attributes.name: placeholderSize
attributes.description: Any | 占位内容大小 (默认 15)

attributes.name: placeholderColor
attributes.description: String | 占位内容颜色 (默认 #888 )

attributes.name: confirmTheme
attributes.description: String | 确定按钮主题 (默认 primary)

attributes.name: confirmText
attributes.description: String | 确定按钮文字 (默认 确定 )

attributes.name: confirmColor
attributes.description: String | 确定按钮文字颜色 (默认 $ux.Conf.primaryColor )

attributes.name: confirmSize
attributes.description: Any | 确定按钮文字大小 (默认 15)

attributes.name: confirmStyle
attributes.description: String | 确定按钮自定义样式

attributes.name: cancelTheme
attributes.description: String | 取消按钮主题 (默认 primary)

attributes.name: cancelText
attributes.description: String | 取消按钮文字 (默认 取消 )

attributes.name: cancelColor
attributes.description: String | 取消按钮文字颜色 (默认 $ux.Conf.primaryColor )

attributes.name: cancelSize
attributes.description: Any | 取消按钮文字大小 (默认 15)

attributes.name: cancelStyle
attributes.description: String | 取消按钮自定义样式

attributes.name: background
attributes.description: String | 背景颜色

attributes.name: backgroundDark
attributes.description: String | 深色 none - 不显示，auto - 自动适配深色模式，其他 - 颜色

attributes.name: showBlur
attributes.description: Boolean | 开启模糊背景 (默认 false )

attributes.name: blurRadius
attributes.description: Number | 模糊半径 (默认 10 )

attributes.name: blurColor
attributes.description: String | 模糊颜色  (默认 rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.3) )

attributes.name: showClose
attributes.description: Boolean | 显示关闭 (默认 false )

attributes.name: showCancel
attributes.description: Boolean | 点击关闭 (默认 false )

attributes.name: showFooter
attributes.description: Boolean | 显示底部 (默认 true )

attributes.name: editable
attributes.description: Boolean | 输入内容 (默认 false )

attributes.name: autoFocus
attributes.description: Boolean | 自动聚焦 (默认 false )

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Any | 宽度 (默认 84%)

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Any | 最小高度 (默认 240)

attributes.name: maxHeight
attributes.description: Any | 最大高度 (默认 500)

attributes.name: radius
attributes.description: Any | 圆角 (默认 20)

attributes.name: maskOpacity
attributes.description: Number | 遮罩层透明度 (默认 0.6)

attributes.name: maskClose
attributes.description: Boolean | 遮罩层关闭 (默认 false)
